title: senecio eligulatus
intro: Senecio eligulatus, also known as Groundsel Bush or Australian Fireweed, is a flowering plant native to Australia. The medicinal properties of Senecio eligulatus include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues and wounds. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Senecio eligulatus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been traditionally used by indigenous Australians for its medicinal and spiritual properties.
